title: psilochenia pleurocarpa
side_effects: Psilochenia pleurocarpa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting. In some cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, leading to symptoms like hives, itching, and swelling. Improper use of the plant can also lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse health effects. Furthermore, excessive consumption may cause anxiety, panic attacks, or even seizures in rare instances.
